completedWork: Bode Plot Analyzer - NEW: Interactive frequency response analysis for electrical circuits. Features: Six circuit types (RC Low-Pass, RC High-Pass, RL Low-Pass, RL High-Pass, RLC Bandpass, RLC Bandstop), component parameter controls (R: 100Ω-100kΩ, C: 1nF-1mF, L: 1μH-1H, Q: 0.1-10), frequency range selection (logarithmic scale), real-time transfer function calculations. Visual feedback: Interactive SVG magnitude plot (dB) with -3dB cutoff marker, phase plot (degrees) with zero-crossing indicator, current frequency marker with animated cursor, color-coded frequency response curves. Quick presets: Audio Filter (20Hz-20kHz, RC LPF), Radio Tuner (800kHz-1.2MHz, RLC Bandpass, Q=5), Power Supply (0.1Hz-1kHz, RC LPF), Instrumentation (10Hz-100kHz, RC LPF). Educational content: Bode plot fundamentals (magnitude & phase), key concepts (cutoff frequency, bandwidth, slope, phase shift), filter types (low-pass, high-pass, bandpass, bandstop), key formulas (RC/RL cutoff, RLC resonance, decibel conversion), practical applications (audio crossovers, radio tuning, power supply ripple rejection, instrumentation anti-aliasing, control system stability analysis, RF impedance matching). File: pages/simulations/bode-plot-analyzer.vue

Conductor Voltage Drop Calculator - NEW: Calculate voltage drop in electrical conductors with comprehensive material and system analysis. Features: System type support (single-phase 2-wire, three-phase 3-wire), multiple conductor materials (copper, aluminum, gold, silver) with temperature-corrected resistivity, wire size selection (AWG 0000-24, cross-section in mm² with automatic conversion), conductor length (1-1000m), load current (0.1-500A), supply voltage (1-1000V), conductor temperature (-40°C to 200°C). Real-time calculations: Temperature-corrected resistance [R_T = R_20 × (1 + α(T-20))], voltage drop (2×I×R for single-phase, √3×I×R for three-phase), voltage drop percentage, power loss (I²×R), final voltage at load. Visual feedback: Interactive circuit diagram with animated current flow, voltage level indicators, voltage drop percentage gauge, status indicators (✅ Excellent <3%, ⚠️ Acceptable 3-5%, ❌ Problematic >5%), wire diameter and circular mils display. Quick presets: Home Wiring (120V, 15A, 30m, #12 Cu), Automotive (12V, 20A, 5m, #10 Cu, 60°C), Industrial (480V, 100A, 150m, #2 Cu, 75°C, 3-phase), Solar PV (48V, 25A, 20m, #8 Cu, 70°C). Educational content: Voltage drop fundamentals, acceptable limits (NEC recommendations), factors affecting voltage drop (length, wire size, current, material, temperature), mitigation strategies (larger gauge, shorter runs, higher voltage, copper usage), key formulas (temperature correction, single/three-phase drop, percentage), practical applications (residential, commercial, industrial, renewable energy), material properties table with resistivity and temperature coefficients. File: pages/calculators/conductor-voltage-drop.vue

Navigation Updates - Added Bode Plot Analyzer to pages/simulations/index.vue with frequency response visualization SVG showing magnitude curve, -3dB line, cutoff frequency marker, and phase curve. Added Conductor Voltage Drop Calculator to pages/calculators/index.vue with id=83, categorized under 'basic', 'power', and 'components' categories.
latestCommit: feat: add Bode Plot Analyzer and Conductor Voltage Drop Calculator
buildStatus: Complete - Successfully created and integrated two new educational features: Bode Plot Analyzer (pages/simulations/bode-plot-analyzer.vue) with six circuit types, real-time frequency response analysis, interactive magnitude/phase plots, cutoff frequency detection, and comprehensive filter theory; Conductor Voltage Drop Calculator (pages/calculators/conductor-voltage-drop.vue) with single/three-phase support, multiple materials, temperature correction, AWG/mm² conversion, real-time voltage drop calculations, visual circuit representation, and detailed electrical code guidance. Both features use Vue 3 Composition API, include interactive SVG visualizations, preset configurations, and extensive educational content covering theory, formulas, and practical applications. Updated navigation indexes. Changes committed and pushed to GitHub (commit 771cf4c).
